dialogue.text: Martin! Welcome to New York. The city never sleeps, and neither do our deployments.
We've been pushing the boundaries of automated reasoning here. It's a whole new scale.
Remember when we thought Freiburg was intense? That was just the warm-up.
Look who made it to the Big Apple! Long way from Freiburg, huh?
The team here is something else. Fast-paced, but we ship real impact.
Let's grab coffee later. I know a place in Midtown.
